column3: The model learns from labeled data (input data paired with the correct output) to map inputs to outputs.
column4: Spam filtering, House price prediction, Medical diagnosis

column3: The model learns from unlabeled data, looking for hidden structures, patterns, or groupings on its own.
column4: Customer segmentation, Anomaly detection (fraud), Recommendation systems

column3: An agent learns to make decisions by performing actions in an environment and receiving feedback via rewards/penalties.
column4: Game playing (AlphaGo), Robot navigation, Optimizing trading strategies

column3: The ability of a computer to comprehend the structure and meaning of sentences (semantics, syntax, sentiment).
column4: Sentiment analysis, Spam detection, Email classification

column3: The process of transforming structured data into readable human language (text or speech).
column4: Automated report writing, Chatbots generating responses

column3: Automating the translation of text or speech from one language to another.
column4: Google Translate, Real-time conversation translation devices

column3: Assigning a specific label or category to an entire image.
column4: Identifying plant diseases, Organizing photo libraries

column3: Identifying and locating multiple objects within a single image.
column4: Self-driving cars (pedestrian detection), Security surveillance, Inventory management

column3: Identifying or verifying a person’s identity using their face.
column4: Unlocking smartphones, Airport security, Social media tagging

column3: Using sensors (cameras, LiDAR) to map and understand the environment.
column4: Vacuum robots mapping rooms, Mars rovers navigating terrain

column3: Calculating the optimal path for a robot to move from A to B without hitting obstacles.
column4: Warehouse logistics robots, Autonomous drone flight paths

column3: Studying and designing how robots and humans communicate and collaborate.
column4: Collaborative robots (Cobots) in factories, Therapeutic robots
Virtual assistants (Siri, Alexa), Automated closed captioning, Medical dictation

column3: Converting written text into spoken audio.
Solving complex problems by reasoning through a body of knowledge using logic rules.
column4: Industrial equipment maintenance, Medical diagnosis support, Loan approval systems

column3: Algorithms that search through possible future states to find a sequence of actions that achieves a goal.
column4: Logistics route optimization, Airport gate assignment, Space mission scheduling

column3: Logic that deals with approximate reasoning rather than fixed true/false, allowing for partial truth.
column4: Appliance control systems (washing machines), Anti-lock braking systems (ABS)
